mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_osh_committee_list ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_osh_committee_list ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_osh_committee_list WHERE osh_year = #{oshYear} ORDER BY osh_quarter ASC, created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_osh_committee_list WHERE osh_year = #{oshYear}
SELECT * FROM tb_osh_committee_list WHERE osh_year = #{oshYear} AND osh_quarter = #{oshQuarter} ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_osh_committee_list WHERE osh_year = #{oshYear} AND osh_quarter = #{oshQuarter}
SELECT * FROM tb_osh_committee_list WHERE osh_location LIKE '%' + #{oshLocation} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_osh_committee_list WHERE osh_location LIKE '%' + #{oshLocation} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_osh_committee_list (osh_id, osh_date, osh_year, osh_quarter, osh_location, osh_location_detail, attendee_count, main_agenda, comment, is_file_created, author_name, author_mail, author_dept, author_company, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{oshId}, #{oshDate}, #{oshYear}, #{oshQuarter}, #{oshLocation}, #{oshLocationDetail}, #{attendeeCount}, #{mainAgenda}, #{comment}, #{isFileCreated}, #{authorName}, #{authorMail}, #{authorDept}, #{authorCompany}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_osh_committee_list SET osh_date = #{oshDate}, osh_year = #{oshYear}, osh_quarter = #{oshQuarter}, osh_location = #{oshLocation}, osh_location_detail = #{oshLocationDetail}, attendee_count = #{attendeeCount}, main_agenda = #{mainAgenda}, comment = #{comment}, is_file_created = #{isFileCreated}, author_name = #{authorName}, author_mail = #{authorMail}, author_dept = #{authorDept}, author_company = #{authorCompany}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_osh_committee_list SET attendee_count = #{count} WHERE osh_id = #{oshId}
